text.message: Red/blue if you rob black I’ll be so grateful
I mean I wouldn't have done that if you didnt take the 6 ore spot brother
you have a better position that black the 4 5 11 is clear
I’d literally give all my cards in order to get you to lose
Genuinely will make sure you lose
genuinely dedicating my game to making sure you lose
blue i can agree to a truce if you don;t let oj feed you lol
Part of the game is social. You purposefully ruined my game not once, but twice
you are objectively throwing and said it multiple times
that isnt part of the game lol
in fact its explicitly not allowed
Black is winning I have to stop him
If red wins then that’s deserved tbh
I feel like youre joking but I cant tell
Blue you need to take road
let me and blue duke it out
